properties.description: MDM Error Reporting pipeline. Called by PL_MDM_Master_Location on failure. Logs error details and sends Teams alert. Pattern: PL_Error_Handling (adf-master-dwh-dev-gwc).

text.value: @concat('UPDATE mdm_config.execution_log SET status = ''Failed'', completed_at = current_timestamp(), error_message = ''Pipeline failed — see ADF monitor for details'' WHERE run_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.__paramMasterRunId, '''')

body.value: @concat('{"@type": "MessageCard", "@context": "http://schema.org/extensions", "themeColor": "FF0000", "summary": "MDM Pipeline Failed", "sections": [{"activityTitle": "⚠️ MDM Master Location Pipeline FAILED", "facts": [{"name": "Run ID", "value": "', pipeline().parameters.__paramMasterRunId, '"}, {"name": "Time", "value": "', utcnow(), '"}], "markdown": true}]}')
